chrom.description: A string specifying the chromosome of region to be plotted

chromstart.description: An integer start position on chromosome to be plotted

chromend.description: An integer end position on chromosome to be plotted

assembly.description: A string specifying the default genome assembly or a plotgardener assembly object

fill.description: A character value(s) as a single value or vector specifying fill colors of transcripts

colorbyStrand.description: A logical value indicating whether to color plus and minus strands by the first two colors in a fill vector, where plus strand transcripts will be colored by the first fill color and minus strand transcripts will be colored by the second fill color

strandSplit.description: A logical value indicating whether plus and minus-stranded transcripts should be separated, with plus strand transcripts plotted above the x-axis and minus strand transcripts plotted below the x-axis

boxHeight.description: A numeric or unit object specifying height of transcripts

spaceWidth.description: A numeric value specifying the width of minimum spacing between transcripts, as a fraction of the plot's genomic range

spaceHeight.description: A numeric value specifying the height of spacing between transcripts on different rows, as a fraction of boxHeight

limitLabel.description: A logical value indicating whether to draw a "+" when not all elements can be plotted in the plotting space

transcriptHighlights.description: A two-column dataframe with a column named "transcript" or "gene" containing transcript names or their associated gene names as strings to highlight and a column named "color" containing corresponding highlight colors

fontsize.description: A numeric specifying text fontsize in points

labels.description: A character value describing the format of transcript text labels

stroke.description: A numeric value indicating the stroke width for transcript body outlines

bg.description: A character value indicating background color

x.description: A numeric or unit object specifying transcript plot x-location

y.description: A numeric, unit object, or character containing a "b" combined with a numeric value specifying transcript plot y-location

width.description: A numeric or unit object specifying transcript plot width

height.description: A numeric or unit object specifying transcript plot height

just.description: A string specifying the justification of transcript plot relative to its (x, y) location

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if x, y, width, or height are only given as numerics

draw.description: A logical value indicating whether graphics output should be produced

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
